originalTitle: Maa Inti Bangaaram - Official Trailer | Samantha | Raj Nidimoru | Nandini Reddy | Santhosh Narayanan
content: Presenting you the Official Teaser Trailer of "Maa Inti Bangaram" Starring Samantha & Others, Created by: Raj Nidimoru Directed by BV Nandini Reddy, Produced by Tralala Moving Pictures, Music Composed by Santhosh Narayanan. This GOLD is BLOODY BOLD 💥💥 Coming to Theatres June 19 2026 Created by: Raj Nidimoru Directed by: BV Nandini Reddy Produced by: Tralala Moving Pictures Producers: Raj Nidimoru, Samantha, Himank Reddy Duvvuru Director of Photography: Om Prakash ISC Music: Santhosh Narayanan Written by: Raj Nidimoru, Vasanth Maringanti Additional Screenplay: Prahas Boppudi Creative Supervisor: Sita R Menon Creative Supervisor: Sita R Menon CEO : Himank Reddy Duvvuru Editor: Dharmendra Kakarala Production Designer: Ullas Hydoor Action Director: Lee Whittaker, Aejaz gulab Choreographer : Pony Verma Costume Designer: Pallavi Singh VFX Supervisor & Post - Production Supervisor : Nikhil Koduru Fight Master: Marvel Natraj Sound Design: Pradeep G Sound Mixing: Ajith A George Executive Producer: Rakesh Reddy Gaddam Line Producer: Aryan Daggubati Direction Department: Srinivas Modukuri, Guru Kiran Bathula, Kushal Santhosh, Anvesh D, Mahesh Pallapu, Naga Vamsi Anuganti, Varsha Ria Ponnaganti, Aaditya Ruddarraju PRO: Vamsi Kaka Marketing: First Show Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX Publicity Designs: Yellow tooths VFX by SARVA.FX DI: B2H Studios Audio Label : Think Music © 2026 SPI Music Pvt. Ltd. For All Latest Updates: Subscribe to us on: http://www.youtube.com/@ThinkMusicTelugu Follow us on https://www.instagram.com/thinkmusic.telugu #maainitibangaaramtrailer #samantha #santhoshnarayanan #nandini #rajnidimoru #maaintibangaaram #mibteaser
chineseSummary: 思考音乐泰卢固语 · 828,005 次观看
chineseContent: 为您呈现由 Samantha 等人主演的《Maa Inti Bangaram》官方预告片，创作者：Raj Nidimoru，BV Nandini Reddy 执导，Tralala Moving Pictures 制作，Santhosh Narayanan 作曲。 《This GOLD is BLOODY BOLD》将于 2026 年 6 月 19 日登陆影院 创作者：Raj Nidimoru 导演：BV Nandini Reddy 制作人：Tralala Moving Pictures 制片人：Raj Nidimoru、Samantha、Himank Reddy Duvvuru 摄影指导：Om Prakash ISC 音乐：Santhosh Narayanan 编剧：Raj Nidimoru、 Vasanth Maringanti 附加剧本：Prahas Boppudi 创意总监：Sita R Menon 创意总监：Sita R Menon 首席执行官：Himank Reddy Duvvuru 编辑：Dharmendra Kakarala 制作设计师：Ullas Hydoor 动作指导：Lee Whittaker、Aejaz gulab 编舞：Pony Verma 服装设计师：Pallavi Singh 视觉特效总监兼后期制作总监：Nikhil Koduru 格斗大师：Marvel Natraj 声音设计：Pradeep G 混音：Ajith A George 执行制片人：Rakesh Reddy Gaddam 制片人：Aryan Daggubati 导演部门：Srinivas Modukuri、Guru Kiran Bathula、Kushal Santhosh、Anvesh D、Mahesh Pallapu、Naga Vamsi Anuganti、Varsha Ria Ponnaganti、Aaditya Ruddarraju PRO：Vamsi Kaka 营销：首秀视觉促销：恰到好处的 Studioz NX 宣传设计：黄牙 VFX by SARVA.FX DI：B2H Studios 音频标签：Think Music © 2026 SPI Music Pvt.有限公司所有最新更新：订阅我们：http://www.youtube.com/@ThinkMusicTelugu 在 https://www.instagram.com/thinkmusic.telugu 关注我们 #maainitibangaaramtrailer #samantha #santhoshnarayanan #nandini #rajnidimoru #maaintibangaaram #mibteaser
